# GitCode Viewer

GitCode Viewer is a mobile Git client for reading and reviewing code on Android.

## Canonical URLs
- https://gitcodeviewer.xdnote.com/
- https://gitcodeviewer.xdnote.com/privacy/

## Key Product Facts
- Desktop-class Git actions on mobile: clone, pull, branch, log, and diff.
- Supports major Git providers: GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Azure DevOps, and Gitea.
- Supports SSH connections and private repositories.
- Offline-first code reading with syntax highlighting and repository history.
- No analytics or tracking data collection.

## FAQ (Search-Friendly)
- Q: Can I clone and pull repositories on Android?
  A: Yes. GitCode Viewer supports clone and pull directly on mobile.
- Q: Does it support branch, log, and diff?
  A: Yes. GitCode Viewer supports branch operations, commit log browsing, and file diff review.
- Q: Which Git providers are supported?
  A: GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Azure DevOps, and Gitea.
- Q: Does it support SSH and private repositories?
  A: Yes. SSH connections and private repositories are supported.
- Q: Can I read repositories offline?
  A: Yes. After cloning, repositories can be read offline.

## Official App Link
- https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.xdnote.codeviewer
